ops.title: cc-guides: remove the v1 .src render path (post-v0.41.0 cleanup)
ops.description: With repo-bootstrap v0.41.0 shipped (native layout scaffold, zero .src emitted) and the fleet at zero tracked *.src.* files, cc-guides can drop the deprecated v1 machinery in a follow-up release: renderV1 + v1compat.go including the v1-only transition default (CCSkillsAlias/CCSkillsSpec constants live in internal/migrate — they die together with migrate/init legacy support), the v1 {{> name}} directive machinery (guide/parse.go), legacy ParseBanner/StripBanner recognition in check/action fallbacks, AddBanner, checkV1Src, and the banner fallback branches in action.yml + re-render.yml (lock-first becomes lock-only). Before cutting: sweep `gh search code` / fleet ls-files for any remaining tracked *.src.* or bannered artifacts outside the fleet (scratch/demo repos may exist). Breaking for any straggler — release notes must say so.

ops.text: cc-guides release with renderV1/v1compat/directive machinery/AddBanner/legacy banner fallbacks deleted; go test -race green
action.yml and re-render.yml are lock-only (no banner fallback) and action-v1 advanced
Pre-flight sweep confirmed zero tracked *.src.* files and zero banner-only repos consuming action-v1 before the release
